createOrSelectPantry: Create or select a pantry to start.
barcodeScannedNoDb: Barcode {{code}} was scanned but not found in database. Enter details manually.
serverCommunicationError: An error occurred while communicating with the server.
noPantrySelectedRefresh: No pantry selected. Please refresh the page.
namePriceAmountRequired: Name, price, and a valid amount/weight are required.
cantAddPastExpiration: You can't add products with a past expiration date.
noServerResponse: No response from server. Check your connection.
categoryAutoHint: Category is auto-matched and may be inaccurate. You can always adjust it manually.
freshProductHint: Expiration is estimated from category averages. Treat it as guidance.
startBySearching: Start by searching for a product
cantFindEnterManually: Can't find the product? Enter it manually
piecesMustBeInteger: For 'pcs.' unit the amount must be an integer.
howMuchDoAction: How much of "{{name}}" do you want to {{verb}}?
enterValueGreaterThanZero: Enter or choose a value greater than zero.
cantMoreThanOwned: You can't {{amount}} {{unit}} more than you own.
fullStatsHint: You can see full details in

todayFocus.title: Today's focus
todayFocus.bodyUrgent: You have {{count}} product close to expiry. Build the day around it before it turns into waste.
todayFocus.bodyUrgent_one: You have {{count}} product close to expiry. Build the day around it before it turns into waste.
todayFocus.bodyUrgent_other: You have {{count}} products close to expiry. Build the day around them before they turn into waste.
todayFocus.bodyCalm: Your pantry is in good shape. This is the right moment to use the oldest products before pressure builds up.
todayFocus.tipBody: Mark products as used right after a meal. Statistics, achievements, and forecasts refresh automatically.
todayFocus.error: Could not load the rescue plan.
todayFocus.emptyBody: Add products to your pantry and iPurel will build priorities, at-risk value, and a quick usage plan.

recipe.sandwich: Make a quick sandwich, toast, or lunchbox from the products that expire first.
recipe.pan: Put the priority ingredients in one pan and turn them into one warm meal.
recipe.bowl: Make a dairy and fruit bowl: fast breakfast, less waste.
recipe.salad: Build a salad or smoothie from whatever has the shortest date.
recipe.quick: Pick the first product on the list and plan a simple meal around it.

scoreCopy.good: You are on a strong track. Just keep an eye on the nearest dates.
scoreCopy.medium: A few products need attention. Two quick moves can lift the score fast.
scoreCopy.low: Your pantry needs action. Start with the first product in the plan.

shoppingIntel.title: Buy only what makes sense
shoppingIntel.body: iPurel reads your current pantry and suggests what to restock, what not to duplicate, and which essentials are missing.
shoppingIntel.error: Could not load the shopping radar.
shoppingIntel.restockBody: Products that are almost gone or already depleted.
shoppingIntel.avoidBody: Use what is close to expiry before adding more.
shoppingIntel.avoidEmpty: Nothing is currently blocking the next shop.
shoppingIntel.coverageBody: Core categories that are missing from your active pantry.

nextAchievement.completeBody: You have unlocked every achievement for now. New goals will arrive as iPurel grows.

smartStart.title: Build your first intelligent pantry
smartStart.body: Create a pantry, add the first product, and let iPurel organize priorities, reminders, shopping advice, and goals automatically.

pantry.title: 1. Create a pantry
pantry.body: Separate home, business, or shared shopping into focused spaces.

scan.title: 2. Add products
scan.body: Enter items manually or scan a barcode when the product is available.

track.title: 3. Act with a plan
track.body: The dashboard shows what to use, what not to buy, and the next goal to reach.

footer.description: FoodTracker by iPurel — a simple way to avoid food waste. Running a business? Check out our booking widget.
footer.ctaBody: Write to us if you want to connect FoodTracker with restaurant, shop, or team operations.

statsPage.efficiencyHint: Percentage of saved products compared to all.
statsPage.monthForecastHint: If you maintain the current saving pace.
statsPage.selectPantryPrompt: Select a pantry in the top menu to see statistics.
statsPage.fetchError: Failed to fetch data for this pantry.

categoryStats.title: Category breakdown
categoryStats.noData: No data about saved or wasted products in this pantry.

mostWasted.title: Biggest Losses
mostWasted.none: No wasted products. Keep it up!

onboarding.title: Welcome to Food Tracker!
onboarding.body: To add your first product, simply
onboarding.clickHint: click a day on the calendar

work_titan_10.title: Work Titan
work_titan_10.desc: Add {{value}} different products in one day.

full_house_20.title: Full House
full_house_20.desc: Have {{value}} different active products at once.

investor_250.title: Shopping Connoisseur
investor_250.desc: Buy products worth a total of {{value}} PLN.

sunday_planner_5.title: Sunday Planner
sunday_planner_5.desc: Add at least {{value}} products on a Sunday.

night_owl.title: Night Owl
night_owl.desc: Add a product between midnight and 4:00 AM.

cheese_connoisseur.title: Cheese Connoisseur
cheese_connoisseur.desc: Add {{value}} different products with 'cheese' in the name.

healthy_monday.title: Healthy Monday
healthy_monday.desc: Add a healthy product on Monday.

morning_caffeine.title: Morning Caffeine
morning_caffeine.desc: Add coffee or tea before 9:00 AM.

profilePage.expiringHint: Receive emails about products that will expire soon.
profilePage.externalPasswordInfo: Your account is linked to an external provider. You can manage your password in that provider's settings.
profilePage.deleteDescription: This action is irreversible. All data will be deleted.
profilePage.deleteModalDescription: This action cannot be undone. All data will be deleted.

pantryMgmt.createSectionHint: You can create up to 3 own pantries. Joining other pantries has no limit.
pantryMgmt.ownerOnlyRenameHint: Only the owner can rename the pantry.
pantryMgmt.inviteValid15m: Remember, this link is valid for 15 minutes only!
pantryMgmt.generatedActive15m: The generated link will be active for 15 minutes.

modals.removeMsg: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the pantry? They will lose access.
modals.deleteMsg: This action is irreversible. All products and data in the "{{name}}" pantry will be permanently deleted.
modals.leaveMsg: Are you sure you want to leave this pantry? To join again, you'll need a new invitation.

toasts.nameEmpty: Name cannot be empty and must differ from the current one.
toasts.createNameTooShort: Pantry name must be at least 2 characters.

page.title: Pantry Management
page.subtitle: Change the name, invite members or delete your pantry.

errors.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms and review the Privacy Policy.
errors.recaptchaRequired: Please confirm you are not a robot.
errors.socialEmail: This email is linked to a social account. Use social login.
errors.emailExists: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.

registerPage.title: Create your account
registerPage.agree: I accept the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> and <terms>Terms & Conditions</terms>.
registerPage.ageNotice: By signing up you confirm you are at least 16 or have guardian consent.

forgotPage.title: Forgot password
forgotPage.body: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

verifyPage.body: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.

emailSentPage.title: Check your inbox

status.used: ℹ️ Your account was already verified.

barcode.cameraErrorAlert: Could not access the camera. Check your browser permissions.

cookie.title: Cookies
cookie.body: By using the app you agree to the use of cookies that are necessary for the service (e.g. remembering theme, language and session).
